title: Coworking Cleaning Management System Review: Top 5 Tools Comparison 2026
description: Review CleanTelligent, SmartClean, Janitorial Manager and other cleaning management tools, comparing cleaning plans, cleaning tracking, cleaning evaluation, and cleaning reporting capabilities. Learn more about feature and price comparisons to find the best solution for you! Professional reviews help you decide!
content:
Value of Cleaning Management in Member Experience Foundation

Coworking cleaning directly impacts member experience: space cleaning, restroom cleaning, kitchen cleaning, public area cleaning. Cleaning management systems help operators manage cleaning plans, track cleaning quality, and evaluate cleaning effectiveness. 2026 data shows cleaning management systems improve cleaning quality by 40%, reduce member complaints by 50%, and optimize cleaning costs.

Excellent cleaning management systems should have: cleaning plans, cleaning tracking, cleaning evaluation, cleaning reporting, cleaning reminders, mobile cleaning management, cleaning recommendations, cleaning history, cleaning staff management, and API integration. Deep reviews focus on these core capabilities.

Top 5 Cleaning Management Tools Deep Review

CleanTelligent: Professional Cleaning Management Platform

CleanTelligent is a professional cleaning management platform covering the entire cleaning process.

Core Features:

  • Cleaning Plan: Cleaning plan creation and reminders
  • Cleaning Tracking: Cleaning task tracking, cleaning status updates
  • Cleaning Evaluation: Cleaning quality evaluation, cleaning checklists
  • Cleaning Report: Cleaning statistics report, cleaning quality report
  • Cleaning Reminder: Cleaning plan reminders
  • Mobile Cleaning: iOS and Android App, mobile cleaning operations
  • Cleaning Recommendations: Cleaning optimization recommendations
  • Cleaning History: Cleaning history records
  • Cleaning Staff Management: Cleaning staff scheduling and management
  • Integration: Integration with facility management systems

Pricing: Starting at $49/month.

User Reviews: Professional cleaning management, good mobile experience, suitable for operators who value cleaning management.

SmartClean: Intelligent Cleaning Management Platform

SmartClean is an intelligent cleaning management platform, known for cleaning evaluation.

Core Features:

  • Cleaning Plan: Cleaning plan creation
  • Cleaning Tracking: Cleaning task tracking
  • Cleaning Evaluation: Strong cleaning quality evaluation
  • Cleaning Report: Cleaning report
  • Mobile Cleaning: Mobile cleaning management

Pricing: Starting at $99/month.

User Reviews: Strong cleaning evaluation capabilities, suitable for operators who value cleaning quality.

Janitorial Manager: Cleaning Management Platform

Janitorial Manager is a cleaning management platform covering cleaning management.

Core Features:

  • Cleaning Plan: Cleaning plan creation
  • Cleaning Tracking: Cleaning task tracking
  • Cleaning Staff Management: Cleaning staff scheduling
  • Cleaning Report: Cleaning report
  • Mobile Cleaning: Mobile cleaning management

Pricing: Starting at $25/month.

User Reviews: Convenient cleaning staff management, suitable for operators who value staff management.

Orange Cleaner: Lightweight Cleaning Management

Orange Cleaner is a lightweight cleaning management platform, suitable for small spaces.

Core Features:

  • Cleaning Plan: Basic cleaning plan
  • Cleaning Tracking: Cleaning task tracking
  • Cleaning Report: Cleaning report

Pricing: Starting at $19/month.

User Reviews: Lightweight and easy to use, suitable for small spaces.

Nexudus Cleaning: Cleaning Management Module

Nexudus Cleaning is the cleaning management module of the Nexudus platform, integrated with operations.

Core Features:

  • Cleaning Plan: Cleaning plan
  • Cleaning Tracking: Cleaning tracking
  • Cleaning Report: Cleaning report
  • Integration: Integration with operations system

Pricing: Included in Nexudus platform, basic version 149 EUR/month.

User Reviews: Smooth integration with operations system, suitable for operators using Nexudus.

Selection Recommendations: Matching Cleaning Needs with Evaluation Capabilities

Professional Cleaning Management: Recommend CleanTelligent. Professional cleaning management, good mobile experience, suitable for operators who value cleaning management.

Cleaning Evaluation Priority: Recommend SmartClean. Strong cleaning evaluation capabilities, suitable for operators who value cleaning quality.

Cleaning Staff Management: Recommend Janitorial Manager. Convenient cleaning staff management, suitable for operators who value staff management.

Lightweight Cleaning Needs: Recommend Orange Cleaner. Lightweight and easy to use, low cost, suitable for small spaces.

Operations Data Integration: Recommend Nexudus Cleaning. Smooth integration with operations system, suitable for operators using Nexudus.

2026 Cleaning Management Development Trends Prediction

Trend 1: Automated Cleaning Plans. Cleaning plans will be automatically created and reminded, reducing omissions.

Trend 2: Cleaning Quality Evaluation Upgrade. Cleaning quality evaluation will be standardized, cleaning checklists automated.

Trend 3: Mobile Cleaning Mainstream. Cleaning staff complete cleaning operations in mobile App, mobile cleaning becomes mainstream.

Trend 4: Cleaning Data Analysis. Cleaning frequency, quality scores will become service optimization indicators.

Trend 5: Cleaning and Member Complaint Association. Cleaning will be associated with member complaint data, cleaning problem identification.

Trend 6: Cleaning AI Prediction. AI will predict cleaning needs, arranging cleaning tasks in advance.

When choosing cleaning management tools, prioritize cleaning evaluation and mobile experience. CleanTelligent suits professional cleaning, SmartClean suits cleaning evaluation, Janitorial Manager suits staff management.
